zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton於1409年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈洛登時，他的父親John Sapcote39歲，母親Johanna Dinham42歲。他和Mrs Richard Sapcotes至少有2個兒子。他去世於1477年在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾福瑟林加。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton于1409年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈洛登时，他的父亲John Sapcote39岁，母亲Johanna Dinham42岁。他和Mrs Richard Sapcotes至少有2个儿子。他去世于1477年在英国英格兰亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾福瑟林加。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton was born in 1409, in Harrowden, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Sapcote, was 39 and his mother, Johanna Dinham, was 42. He had at least 2 sons with Mrs Richard Sapcotes. He died in 1477, in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Fotheringhay, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton est né en 1409, à Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Sapcote, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Johanna Dinham, avait 42 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Mrs Richard Sapcotes. Il est décédé en 1477, à Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Fotheringhay, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton 1409 in Harrowden, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Sapcote 39 und seine Mutter Johanna Dinham 42. Er hatte mit Mrs Richard Sapcotes mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1477 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Fotheringhay, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton è nato il nel 1409 nel Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Sapcote, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Dinham, aveva 42 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Mrs Richard Sapcotes. Morì nel 1477, nel Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Fotheringhay, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Sapcote of Eltonが1409年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーロウデンで生まれた時，父John Sapcoteは39歳，母Johanna Dinhamは42歳であった。彼はMrs Richard Sapcotesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1477年にイギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアハンティングドンで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアフォスエリンガイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton(이)가 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 해로우든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Sapcote(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Dinham(은)는 42세였다. 그는 Mrs Richard Sapcotes(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1477년 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 헌틴그던에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 포더잉하이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton nasceu em 1409, em Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Sapcote, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Dinham, tinha 42 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Mrs Richard Sapcotes. Ele faleceu em 1477, em Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Fotheringhay, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton родился в 1409 г. в местности харроуден, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Sapcote было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Dinham, 42. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Mrs Richard Sapcotes. Он умер в 1477 г. в местности хантингдон, хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности фотирингхеи, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Sapcote of Elton nació en 1409, en Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Sapcote, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Johanna Dinham, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Mrs Richard Sapcotes. Murió en 1477, en Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Fotheringhay, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
